lint.note: No .eslintrc/eslint config exists under app/; `next lint` prompts interactively to scaffold one and cannot run non-interactively in this environment. Recorded as NO_LINT per the pre-existing-debt baseline convention — this story introduces no lint tooling change.

e2e.note: Full e2e gate (make test-e2e-all) is owned by the lead per project convention; architect verifies only that the new spec is syntactically valid and collects via --list.
